case.title: DUNN v. COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES

opinion.h: DUNN v. COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES, 357 U.S. 344 (1958)
DUNN ET AL. v. COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 952. Decided June 23, 1958.
opinion.p: Harold W. Kennedy for the County of Los Angeles, appellee.
Roger J. Whiteford, John J. Wilson, Oscar John Dorwin and Ray A. Pittman, Jr., for the Texas Company, appellee.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
